title: caladenia attingens subsp. gracillima
intro: Caladenia attingens subsp. gracillima, also known as the gracilous spider orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to Western Australia. The plant contains various bioactive compounds with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant are still being researched, but preliminary studies suggest its extracts may have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. However, there is limited information on the traditional herbal preparations of Caladenia attingens subsp. gracillima due to its rarity and restricted availability.
